title: 这句话适合用于高端时尚杂志或广告中，强调模特的细节和情感表达，能够吸引观众的注意力并传达一种强烈的视觉冲击力。
image_alt: 这句话适合用于高端时尚杂志或广告中，强调模特的细节和情感表达，能够吸引观众的注意力并传达一种强烈的视觉冲击力。
prompt_original: A striking black and white close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="handsome young Asian man"} with {argument name="hair style" default="messy wet hair sticking to his forehead"}. His face and neck are glistening, covered in highly detailed {argument name="skin texture detail" default="water droplets and sweat"}. He has an intense, melancholic gaze directed off-camera to the left. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing his sharp jawline, full lips, and specular highlights on the wet skin against a {argument name="background" default="pitch-black background"}. Shot in a photorealistic, high-fashion editorial style with cinematic chiaroscuro.
prompt_zh: 一张引人注目的黑白特写肖像，拍摄对象是{argument name="subject description" default="帅气的年轻亚洲男子"}，他的发型是{argument name="hair style" default="凌乱的湿发贴在额头上"}。他的脸部和颈部闪闪发光，布满了非常细致的{argument name="skin texture detail" default="水珠和汗水"}。他目光深邃忧郁，注视着镜头左侧。灯光戏剧化且对比强烈，突出了他棱角分明的下颌线、饱满的嘴唇以及湿润皮肤上的高光，背景为{argument name="background" default="纯黑色背景"}。照片以高度逼真的高级时尚编辑风格拍摄，带有电影般的明暗对比。
